---
title: "Listening, Attention, and AI"
subtitle: "From Human Limits to System-Level Cognition"
format:
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    transition: slide
    incremental: true
    theme: default
    embed-resources: true
    self-contained: true
---

```{=html}
<style>
.reveal h2 {
  font-size: 1.4em;
  border-bottom: 3px solid #111827;
  padding-bottom: 0.18em;
}

.reveal p,
.reveal li {
  font-size: 0.92em;
  line-height: 1.45;
}

.keyline {
  border-left: 10px solid #111827;
  padding: 10px 0 10px 14px;
  font-weight: 800;
  margin: 18px 0;
  background: #f8fafc;
}

.note {
  margin-top: 14px;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  background: #f3f4f6;
  border-left: 4px solid #6b7280;
  font-size: 0.82em;
}

.warn {
  margin-top: 14px;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  background: #fff7ed;
  border-left: 4px solid #ea580c;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.84em;
}

.grid-2, .grid-3, .grid-4 {
  display: grid;
  gap: 16px;
  margin-top: 18px;
}

.grid-2 { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
.grid-3 { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; }
.grid-4 { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; }

.box, .box-dark, .step {
  border: 2px solid #1f2937;
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 14px;
  background: white;
}

.box h3, .box-dark h3, .step .title {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.box-dark {
  background: #111827;
  color: white;
}

.compare {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 18px;
  margin-top: 20px;
}

.compare .col {
  border: 2px solid #1f2937;
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 14px;
}

.compare .col.left {
  background: #eef2ff;
}

.compare .col.right {
  background: #f8fafc;
}

.compare .head {
  font-weight: 800;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  font-size: 1.02em;
}

.process {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-top: 20px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.step {
  min-width: 180px;
  text-align: center;
}

.step .title {
  font-size: 0.96em;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.step .desc {
  font-size: 0.82em;
}

.arrow {
  font-size: 1.6em;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.small {
  font-size: 0.8em;
  color: #4b5563;
}

.center {
  text-align: center;
}

.reveal ul {
  margin-top: 10px;
}

.reveal .slides section .fragment.highlight-current-blue.current-fragment {
  font-weight: 800;
}

@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .grid-2, .grid-3, .grid-4, .compare {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}
</style>
